summary: Crispy matrix transfer captures an exceptionally cohesive 1989 summer show with standout performances of Crazy Fingers, Wang‑Dang Doodle and Dear Mr. Fantasy.
review: The matrix source delivers crystal‑clear audio – even a slight treble cut improves the already stunning clarity – while the band rides a wave of hot Garcia playing and tight group cohesion. Reviewers highlight a slew of gems (Crazy Fingers opener, Wang Dang Doodle, Queen Jane, Eyes, Dear Mr. Fantasy, Sugar Magnolia) and note the fluid, set‑less flow that makes this one of the high points of ’89.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are overwhelmingly positive (average 4.4 stars), praising both musical performance and the high‑quality matrix recording; weightings give a strong overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crispy matrix transfer praised as ‘stunning’ with clear mids, slight treble cut improves clarity; no reported drop‑outs or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note a seamless, set‑less flow with total synchronicity and strong cohesion throughout the show.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is described as ‘hot’ and his Crazy Fingers opener is highlighted as a standout moment.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum circle was in full force during the second set, adding to the summer‑day vibe.
